title: planifolia
body:
implements the some of the changes made in the [speedrunning fork of sodium][sr sodium] in the form of an add-on mod, to bring important vanilla parity fixes & functionality to later version runs that use upstream sodium.

this includes:
- showing the vanilla video settings menu when in a world
- e counter saying -1 when entity culling is on
- right side of subchunk counter showing static capacity instead of generated chunks
- leaves having black pixels with fast graphics on pre 1.21.11
- minimizing sodium f3 changes
- reverting resource pack and datapack changes in menus and world files
- adding options for entity culling and fog occlusion to the vanilla video settings menu
- disabling lithium optimizations that break pie-ray
- adding back filterempty and renderLayer profiler entries
- removing weather and leaves independent quality options
- fixing crashes

additionally, with or without sodium:
- allows the use of gamma 5 on 1.19+ (can only set from title screen or options.txt)

this mod is only intended to work with the latest version of sodium for any subversion of minecraft.

[sr sodium]: https://github.com/Minecraft-Java-Edition-Speedrunning/sodium
